TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Michel_Temer, title = Michel_Temer, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Michel_Temer} }

S.FORM: = Michel Temer = Mntucing hngkawas 1940 idas 9 jiyax 23 ka Michel Temer ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Brazil ta sayang o kiya ka Michel Temer, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 8 jiyax 31 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = miʦħəl təməɾ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka miʦħəl təməɾ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan bɾa*il ta sajaŋ o kija ka miʦħəl təməɾ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Michel Temer = Mntucing hngkawas 1940 idas 9 jiyax 23 ka Michel Temer ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Brazil ta sayang o kiya ka Michel Temer, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 8 jiyax 31 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = miʦħəl təməɾ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka miʦħəl təməɾ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan bɾa*il ta sajaŋ o kija ka miʦħəl təməɾ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
